description: Editable run-sheet JSON for generating VFX burst plates before manual alpha cleanup and 256x256 packing.
recommendedModel: Flux Kontext Pro or another effect-friendly partner model
goal: Generate clean high-resolution VFX plates for impact, cast, status, and projectile effects.

defaults.background: dark neutral if true alpha is unreliable
defaults.seedStrategy: group by tone family so related effects stay visually coherent

operatorChecklist: Manually clean alpha before exporting any 256x256 sheet.
Reject effects that need gameplay tint to explain their identity.
